gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (23/132)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (23/132)

parts.text: الْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَلِيِّ بْنِ عَبْدِ الْمَلِكِ

text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) مَنْ وَرِثَ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) فَقَالَ فَاطِمَةُ ( عليها السلام ) وَ وَرِثَتْهُ مَتَاعَ الْبَيْتِ وَ الْخُرْثِيَّ وَ كُلَّ مَا كَانَ لَهُ .

en.hubeali: Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ali Bin Al Hassan, from Ali Bin Asbaat, from Al Hassan Bin Ali Bin Abdul Malik, from Hayday, from Hamza Bin Humran who said,

‘I said to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, ‘Who inherited Rasool-Allah<sup>saw</sup>?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Fatima<sup>asws</sup>, and she<sup>asws</sup> inherited chattels of the house, and the assets, and all that which belonged to him<sup>saww</sup>’.
en.sarwar: 2. Ahmad ibn Muhammad has narrated from Ali ibn al-Hassan from Ali ibn Asbat from al-Hassan ibn Ali ibn ‘Abd al-Malik, Hayde r from Hamzah ibn Humran who has narrated the following: “I once asked abu ‘ Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, ’Who inherited the Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause?’ He (the Imam) said, ’Fatimah, ‘Alayha al-Salam, inherited his household assets and all that belonged to him (the Messenger of Allah).”’
